narrative:
Precinct Bellevue 3 (precinct in Huron County) has 1,038 registered voters, with 65.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
